name: AutoProductSelection
description: 独立承载自动选品 runs 文件状态机、交接队列、锁管理和可配置 AgentAssistant 派发提示。底层数据抓取仍由 ProductSelector 完成。
author: VCP Team

DebugMode.description: 是否开启 AutoProductSelection 调试日志。

AUTO_SELECTION_SCOUT_AGENT_NAME.description: 负责读取 brief 并调用 ProductSelector 取证的 AgentAssistant 名称。

AUTO_SELECTION_REVIEWER_AGENT_NAME.description: 负责读取 raw 并输出 scored/failed 的 AgentAssistant 名称。

AUTO_SELECTION_SCOUT_TASK_PREFIXES.description: 用于识别 scout AgentTask 归档文件的逗号分隔前缀。

AUTO_SELECTION_REVIEWER_TASK_PREFIXES.description: 用于识别 reviewer AgentTask 归档文件的逗号分隔前缀。

APS_SCORE_SELLER_LISTING_SKILL.description: v3评分：卖家的结构性Listing优势(0-1)。仅对'场景代入'型产品(listing_leverage高)放大机会分，对纯功能件几乎不影响。

APS_SCORE_LISTING_LEVERAGE_DEFAULT.description: v3评分：当熔炉未给出 listing_leverage_score 时的默认代入感弹性(0-1)。0=纯功能/规格驱动，1=纯场景/情绪驱动。

APS_SCORE_LISTING_LEVERAGE_GAIN.description: v3评分：Listing杠杆对差异化支柱的增益系数。越大，卖家Listing优势在感性产品上放大越明显。

APS_SCORE_W_COMPETITION.description: v3评分：竞争余地支柱权重。

APS_SCORE_W_EXECUTION.description: v3评分：执行适配支柱权重。

APS_SCORE_TRUST_DEMAND.description: v3评分：需求字段信任度(DOM直抓，高)。

APS_SCORE_TRUST_PROFIT.description: v3评分：利润/广告字段信任度(商机探测器派生，冷门词常失真，低)。

APS_SCORE_TRUST_DIFFERENTIATION.description: v3评分：差异化字段信任度。

APS_SCORE_TRUST_EXECUTION.description: v3评分：执行适配字段信任度。

APS_SCORE_RECOMMEND_FLOOR.description: v3评分：区间决策推荐线。悲观估计>=此值才按RECOMMEND原样发布。

APS_SCORE_DROP_CEILING.description: v3评分：区间决策淘汰线。乐观估计<此值才DROP，否则一律WATCHLIST发布(不静默丢弃)。

APS_SCORE_UNCERTAINTY_MIN.description: v3评分：满信任时的不确定带半宽。

APS_SCORE_UNCERTAINTY_MAX.description: v3评分：零信任时的不确定带半宽。

APS_SCORE_PILLAR_FLOOR.description: v3评分：几何平均支柱下限(避免log(0))。

APS_SCORE_COMPLIANCE_MULT_FLOOR.description: v3评分：非硬门区间的合规软降权下限。

invocationCommands.description: Trigger or resume the automated product-selection workflow. If workflow is already running, returns error. If queue has active runs (after restart), resumes them; otherwise starts a new workflow from brief creation. The workflow runs in closed-loop mode: starts -> processes one complete cycle -> auto-terminates. Returns mode (resume|new) and active_runs count.

One-click comprehensive workflow diagnostics. Returns a Markdown report with: 1) Memory state (isWorkflowRunning, workflowState, consecutiveErrorCount, lastWorkflowError), 2) Physical lock files in runs/locks/, 3) Queue status (active_runs, next_action_hint, stage file counts), 4) Circuit breaker counters from active tasks, 5) Diagnostic recommendations. No parameters required. Use this to understand what the workflow is doing, where it's stuck, or why it stopped.
Dynamically enable or disable detailed workflow logging (debugMode) in the running process. Parameters: optional enable (boolean, defaults to toggling current state). Returns the new debugMode value.

Pause the automated product-selection workflow. Stops the background timer and clears the coordinator lock, leaving all brief/raw/scored files intact. Running auto_selection_trigger_run will resume the workflow.

Abort the automated product-selection workflow and reset all state files. Stops the background timer, clears the coordinator lock, and deletes all active run files (brief, raw, scored, failed, and locks). Next run will start fresh.

Inspect the automated product-selection handoff queue. Returns files in failed/scored/raw/brief/locks/archived, derived active_briefs/stale_briefs/valid_locks/malformed_locks/worker_missing_outputs, worker_timeout_minutes, and next_action_hint. If next_action_hint=retry_worker_once, redispatch the reported worker once with overwrite_lock=true and retry_count+1. If next_action_hint=handle_worker_missing_output, call auto_selection_mark_worker_missing_output. Optional include_content=true includes content for failed/scored/raw files. Optional worker_timeout_minutes defaults to 60.

Write a scoped automated product-selection handoff file. Parameters: stage brief|raw|scored|archived|failed|locks, run_id/runId, content, overwrite=false default. When stage=locks, lock_name is required and must be hawkeye or forge.

Read a scoped automated product-selection handoff file under runs/. Parameters: stage, run_id/runId, optional lock_name for locks. Do not use this for AutoSelectionStrategyProfile.zh-CN.md or AutoSelectionStrategyProfile.md; these strategy files are automatically read and injected by the backend during brief creation.

Prepare a worker dispatch. Parameters: worker scout|reviewer, run_id/runId. Backward-compatible aliases hawkeye|forge are also accepted. For scout, optional brief_content/content writes the brief before dispatch; otherwise an existing brief is required. For reviewer, an existing raw file is required. Optional retry_count/retryCount, dispatch_reason/dispatchReason, overwrite_lock/overwriteLock support the single retry path reported by queue_status. Creates the correct worker lock and returns agent_assistant_request fields. Scout is injected with AutoProductSelection and ProductSelector; Reviewer is injected with AutoProductSelection. Use the returned fields to call AgentAssistant.

Apply the scored post_forge_action safely. Parameters: run_id/runId, optional action, optional scored_content/scoredContent, optional brief_content/briefContent, optional new_run_id/newRunId for DROP_AND_RESELECT. LOOPBACK_TO_SCOUT or LOOPBACK_TO_HAWKEYE preserves raw, deletes scored, clears old locks, writes a loopback brief, creates the scout lock, and returns agent_assistant_request when the request is specific and not repeated. Repeated, unfetchable, vague, or soft-limit loopbacks are converted to a force-decision reviewer dispatch. DROP_AND_RESELECT deletes old brief/raw/scored/failed, clears locks, then writes brief_content to new_run_id or an auto-generated replacement run and prepares scout dispatch. PUBLISH_FINAL returns ready_for_final_publication; publish forum/DailyNote first, then call auto_selection_archive_run.

Archive a completed run with low ambiguity. Parameters: run_id/runId and optional stage/from_stage/fromStage. If stage is omitted, archives the first existing failed/scored/raw/brief file. If the requested stage is missing but another handoff file exists, archives the existing fallback stage instead. Moves the file to archived and cleans same-run residue. Use this after final forum/DailyNote publication or failed blocking report; do not use cleanup_run as a substitute for archive.

Move a handoff file between runs stages. Parameters: from_stage/fromStage or stage, to_stage/toStage, run_id/runId, optional lock names for lock files. If stage is provided without to_stage, it defaults to archived. Moving to archived also cleans same-run residue. Prefer auto_selection_archive_run for final archive.
Delete a handoff file. Parameters: stage brief|raw|scored|archived|failed, run_id/runId. Use auto_selection_clear_locks for locks.
Clean non-archived residue for one run_id. Removes brief/raw/scored/failed files and locks for the run, but keeps archived final files.

Convert a detected worker_missing_output item into a standardized failed handoff file and clear the run locks. Parameters: optional run_id/runId, optional worker_timeout_minutes, overwrite=false default. Use when queue_status.next_action_hint=handle_worker_missing_output.
Delete lock files for a given run_id/runId.
Return AutoProductSelection status and queue directory.
